titleStmt.title: SII 36.221: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 221. (A.R. No. 221 of 1910.) PĀḌI (Tiruvalidāyam), SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the north and west walls of the central shrine in the Tiruvallīśvara temple.

summary.p: The taxes paṭṭaḍai-āyam, paṭṭaḍai-nūlāyam and other taxes levied on the cheṭṭis, kaikkōḷas, vāṇigar and on those people working in the eighteen professional work-shops (patineṭṭup-paṭṭaḍai) in Pāḍi-Tiruvallidāyam were assigned to the temple of Tiruvallidāyamuḍaiya Nāyaṉār, in Ambattūr-nāḍu, of Puḻaṟ-kōṭṭam alias Vikramachōḻa vaḷanāḍu, a subdivision of Jayaṅkoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam, by an order of Mallaṇṇa-Uḍaiyār.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī mahāmaṇḍalīśvaraṉ kaṇṭanāṭu koṇṭāṉ koṇṭanāṭu kuṭātāṉ pāṣaikkut tappuvār Irāyar kaṇṭaṉ śrī vīraariyarirāyaṉukkuc cellā niṉṟa tātri varuṣattu makaranāyaṟṟup pūṟuvapakṣattu
t tecamiyum peṟṟa Uttirattu nāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa maṇṭalattup puḻaṟ koṭṭam Āṉa vikkiṟamacoḻa vaḷanāṭṭu Ampattūr nāṭṭil pāṭi tiruvallitāyattil Uṭaiyār tiruvallitā
yamuṭaiya nāyaṉārkku mallaṇṇa Uṭaiyār nirupapaṭikkup pāṭi tiruvallitāyattil paṭṭaṭaikkuṭi ceṭṭikaḷ kaikkoḷar vāṇikar Eṇṇai vāṇikar maṟṟum Uḷḷiṭṭa
puṟakkalaṉaiyil patiṉeṭṭup paṭṭaṭaiyil Uḷḷa peṟkku paṭṭaṭai Āyam paṭṭaṭainūl Āyam māta Iraṭṭi cammātam cekkum maṟṟum Eppeṟppaṭṭa Āyattai nokki varum Ilāpalokaṅkaḷkkum
Uṭpaṭa Uṭaiyār tiruvallitāyamuṭaiya nāyaṉārkku cantirātittakaḷ varaikkum carvvamāṉiyam Āka naṭakkakaṭavatuākac cilālekai paṇṇik kuṭutteṉ Ittaṉmattukku Akitam niṉaittār Uṇṭākil keṅkai karaiyiṟk kurāp pacuvaik koṉṟa
Digital edition of SII 36.221 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
